name: Payrails
description: Enterprise payment orchestration platform for global merchants unifying PSPs, routing, and data.

seo.title: Payrails — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Payrails: Enterprise payment orchestration platform for global merchants unifying PSPs, routing, and data.

when_to_use: Unifying global PSP connections for enterprise payment stacks
Real-time routing optimization across acquirers and gateways
Centralizing payment performance data across multiple providers

pros: Ex-Delivery Hero team building at enterprise scale
Modern stack focused on routing and data unification
Strong EU presence and enterprise pedigree
Clear product focus on global merchants
cons: Pricing and onboarding via sales only
Less visible in the APAC market
review.verdict: Serious contender for European enterprise orchestration, but out of reach for most SMB and mid-market teams.
review.best_for: Large European enterprises unifying many PSPs, acquirers, and data into one modern control plane.
review.not_for: Startups, SMBs, or teams without dedicated payments engineering headcount.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
